title: Swan SK31020N Brushed Stainless Steel Jug Kettle, Cordless Design, 2000W, 1 Litre, Silver
features: STAINLESS STEEL DESIGN: Stylish brushed stainless steel design with black trim, this kettle would suit any home perfectly
LIGHTWEIGHT 1 LITRE CAPACITY: Suitable if you only want to make up to 5 cups at a time
CORDLESS DESIGN: Easy Pour and 360 degree base, ideal for left or right handed users
2000W OF POWER: For optimum efficiency along with automatic cut out and boil dry protection
2 YEAR GUARANTEE: Comes with a 2-year manufacturer guarantee, protecting you from any issues you find
description: From the manufacturer With a strong British heritage dating back to the 1920s, Swan understands that the kitchen is the heart of home life. It’s where delicious meals are made and memories are created. Iconic Cookware and Appliances Affordable Dream Kitchens 100 Years of British Heritage Stylish Design and Outstanding Performance Ultra-functional without scrimping on style This 1 litre Stainless Steel Kettle by iconic Swan brand is a great addition to any kitchen or office. With 2000W of power you'll not be waiting long to enjoy a hot beverage and a range of safety features including boil-dry protection and automatic cut-off gives you peace of mind. Large 1L capacity lets you make up to 4 cups of tea or coffee from one fill Brushed stainless steel design with a black trim 360-degree rotational base to accommodate for left and right-handed users Boil dry protection ensuring longevity 360 DEGREE SWIVEL BASE It’s designed with an accessible 360-degree rotational base to accommodate for left and right-handed users STAINLESS STEEL DESIGN This kettle would suit any home perfectly with the stylish brushed stainless steel design with a black trim AUTO SHUT-OFF Prevents the kettle from boiling dry, ensuring longevity and avoiding any long-term damage
